category_sources: Official homepage https://haxe.org/ presents Haxe as The Cross-platform Toolkit and links language manual/API documentation.
source_facts.description says Haxe is a multi-platform programming language.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and navigation use Haxe.
docs_sources: Official homepage Learn Haxe navigation links to the manual at haxe.org/manual and API documentation at api.haxe.org.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/HaxeFoundation/haxe; per instruction repo returned as null without second-guessing.
tags_sources: Official homepage links Haxelib, manual, and API documentation.
source_facts.description identifies a multi-platform programming language and executables include haxe and haxelib.
